programs.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programs.sub_title: Resurrection Mary, Nightclub Blaze Whodunit and Wedding Sting
programs.desc: A ghostly siren who once haunted the dance halls of Chicago; a legendary leviathan that terrorized sailors in Maine's coastal waters; a nightclub inferno that claimed the lives of nearly 500 people.

programs.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programs.sub_title: Demon Cat, Murderer on Board and Nevada Giant
programs.desc: A ferocious feline stalks the halls of the U.S. Capitol Building before national tragedies; a gruesome triple murder committed on the high seas; a mammoth mystery in the desert.

programs.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programs.sub_title: The Mysterious Mothman, Sinatra Kidnapping and Florida Zombies
programs.desc: A legendary beast lurks in the forests of West Virginia; a kidnapping plot targets Frank Sinatra's son; the walking dead execute a series of violent attacks.

programs.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programs.sub_title: Cosmic Collision, Haunted Hotel and Van Gogh's Ear
programs.desc: Spectators spot a strange green orb at a high school football game; a haunted hotel inspires a bloodcurdling bestseller; the truth behind the most famous ear in history.

programs.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programs.sub_title: Jolly Jane, Challenger Disaster and Attack of the Bunnyman
programs.desc: A deranged nurse becomes one of history's most prolific serial killers; a tragic explosion changes the NASA space program; a bizarre bunny terrorizes a rural community.

programs.title: Mysteries of the Unknown
programs.sub_title: Sutherland Sisters, Counterfeit Currency and Legionnaires' Disease
programs.desc: Don Wildman unearths extraordinary artifacts as he looks for answers to history's greatest mysteries.
